mapper.select:
select ra.*, td.driver_name, tv.vehicle_number, tw.waybill_number, toc.oil_card_no from t_waybill_oil_card_recharge_apply ra left join t_driver td on ra.driver_id = td.driver_id left join t_vehicle tv on ra.vehicle_id = tv.vehicle_id left join t_waybill tw on ra.waybill_id = tw.waybill_id left join t_oil_card toc on ra.oil_card_id = toc.oil_card_id where ra.waybill_id in
#{item}
